# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before 1.9.0 use apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-node-app
  labels:
    app: hello-node-app
spec:

  replicas: 1
  
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hello-node-app
      
  template:
    metadata:
        labels:
          app: hello-node-app
          
    spec:
      containers:
        
        - name: hello-node 
          imagePullPolicy: Always #This is important so users get the newest container image.
          image: hello-node:latest
          ports:
            
            - containerPort: 3000
